subject: IGY IV Capital Call
body:
WCTII has received a capital call from Island Global Yachting IV in the amount of $1,294,644.10 which is due no later than Friday November 16, 2007.? Do you want me to simply forward the notice to Peg, so that she can clear it with ASW?? Or do you have other instructions?? Please advise.? 

In addition, IGYIV still believes that FTC is trustee of WCTII.? Should I make it PEg's responsibility to advise IGY IV or do you want me to send IGYIV the documents evidencing FTC's resignation and the appointment of ASW as Trustee?? Please advise.

Thanks.
________________________________________________________________________
Email and AIM finally together. You've gotta check out free AOL Mail! - http://mail.aol.com
body_html:
WCTII has received a capital call from Island Global Yachting IV in the amount of $1,294,644.10 which is due no later than Friday November 16, 2007.  Do you want me to simply forward the notice to Peg, so that she can clear it with ASW?  Or do you have other instructions?  Please advise. 

In addition, IGYIV still believes that FTC is trustee of WCTII.  Should I make it PEg's responsibility to advise IGY IV or do you want me to send IGYIV the documents evidencing FTC's resignation and the appointment of ASW as Trustee?  Please advise.

Thanks.
Email and AIM finally together. You've gotta check out free AOL Mail!
